paragraphs.structure: Opens with rhetorical question anticipating judgment, pivots to self-defense through enumeration of hard-won achievements. One long unwinding sentence establishing stakes.
rhetorical-dna: Inverted syntax and archaic constructions create formal, deliberate cadence
Self-aware framing: speaker pre-empts criticism by voicing it first
Triadic listing builds cumulative weight
Intimate metaphor for bond with authority figure
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A figure defends a dangerous choice made at the height of hard-won security.

paragraphs.structure: Opens with defiant reversal, expands into philosophical maxim, then unfolds into extended allegory. Rhythm shifts from terse declaration to lyrical accumulation.
rhetorical-dna: Proverbial wisdom as foundation
Cosmic allegory (example: day vs. night as triumph over darkness)
Personification building in intensity: delicate to wild to triumphant
Parallel construction cascading into celebration
Register shifts from sardonic to exalted
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A character dismisses conventional wisdom by invoking nature's own cycles of triumph and loss.

paragraphs.structure: Two-part movement: first, rhetorical question challenging loyalty to success; second, philosophical self-justification through metaphor.
rhetorical-dna: Defiant self-defense through counter-question
Extended metaphor linking personal loyalty to cosmic phenomena
Archaic formality lending dignity to what might seem betrayal
Final clause lifts into abstraction
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A figure justifies their questionable choices by an extended metaphor with divine/natural phenomenon.

paragraphs.structure: Opens with aphoristic statement, then develops through direct address and extended climbing metaphor. Builds through hypotheticals to grim conclusion.
rhetorical-dna: Maxim as thesis
Direct address creating intimate tutorial tone
Life-as-X metaphor sustained through multiple scenarios
Rhetorical questions driving argument forward
Dark humor in final image (Example: corpse vs. successful climber)
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A character proposes that indirect paths succeed where direct ones lead to ruin or death.

paragraphs.structure: Formal address establishing debt, pivoting to offer of counsel. Single building sentence leading to promise of singular solution.
rhetorical-dna: Courtly formula opening
Parallel construction in middle
Tease structure: many options considered, one chosen
Formal register throughout, deferential but confident
paragraphs.respecification-seed: An character makes a pledge and promises a single best choice after much deliberation.

paragraphs.structure: Opens with chiding observation, proceeds through dismissal of obvious strengths, builds to revelation of hidden greater power. Three beats: critique, enumeration, climactic mystery.
rhetorical-dna: Proverbial wisdom as framing device
Deliberate undercutting of military assets to elevate something intangible
Comparative structure building to superlative
Suspense through withholding: the greater thing unnamed
Direct address maintaining intimate advisory tone
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A character warns against relying on obvious strength, hinting at a hidden greater asset.
